'''âs-l-l''' ('''salala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fletch|fletch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fletch|fletch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-l-l
|-
! Lemma
| salala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:salalithi|salalithi]] || [[word:salaliji|salaliji]] || [[word:salalishi|salalishi]] || [[word:salali|salali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:salaluthuth|salaluthuth]] || [[word:salalujuj|salalujuj]] || [[word:salalushush|salalushush]] || [[word:salal|salal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:salaluthu|salaluthu]] || [[word:salaluju|salaluju]] || [[word:salalushu|salalushu]] || [[word:salalu|salalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:salalufuth|salalufuth]] || [[word:salalufuj|salalufuj]] || [[word:salalufush|salalufush]] || [[word:salaluf|salaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:salalethe|salalethe]] || [[word:salaleje|salaleje]] || [[word:salaleshe|salaleshe]] || [[word:salale|salale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:salalothoth|salalothoth]] || [[word:salalojoj|salalojoj]] || [[word:salaloshosh|salaloshosh]] || [[word:salal|salal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:salalotho|salalotho]] || [[word:salalojo|salalojo]] || [[word:salalosho|salalosho]] || [[word:salalo|salalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:salalofoth|salalofoth]] || [[word:salalofoj|salalofoj]] || [[word:salalofosh|salalofosh]] || [[word:salalof|salalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:salalĂŠthĂŠ|salalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:salalĂŠjĂŠ|salalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:salalĂŠshĂŠ|salalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:salalĂŠ|salalĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:salalathath|salalathath]] || [[word:salalajaj|salalajaj]] || [[word:salalashash|salalashash]] || [[word:salal|salal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:salalatha|salalatha]] || [[word:salalaja|salalaja]] || [[word:salalasha|salalasha]] || [[word:salala|salala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:salalafath|salalafath]] || [[word:salalafaj|salalafaj]] || [[word:salalafash|salalafash]] || [[word:salalaf|salalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:salalasha|salalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosalalasha|gosalalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisalalasha|gokisalalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:salalnĂŒsha|salalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosalalnknĂŒsha|gosalalnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisalalnĂŒsha|gokisalalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:salalshĂ«sha|salalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosalalnkshĂ«sha|gosalalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisalalshĂ«sha|gokisalalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:salalrosha|salalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosalalnkrosha|gosalalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisalalrosha|gokisalalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:salalmusha|salalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalalnkmusha|gosalalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalalmusha|gokisalalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:salalsherasha|salalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosalalnksherasha|gosalalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisalalsherasha|gokisalalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:salalngasha|salalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosalalnkngasha|gosalalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisalalngasha|gokisalalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:salalyasha|salalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosalalnkyasha|gosalalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisalalyasha|gokisalalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:salalyamasha|salalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosalalnkyamasha|gosalalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisalalyamasha|gokisalalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:salalnĂŒshĂ«sha|salalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosalalnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gosalalnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisalalnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokisalalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:salalnĂŒrosha|salalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosalalnknĂŒrosha|gosalalnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisalalnĂŒrosha|gokisalalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salalnĂŒmusha|salalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalalnknĂŒmusha|gosalalnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalalnĂŒmusha|gokisalalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:salalshĂ«nĂŒsha|salalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosalalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gosalalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisalalshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokisalalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:salalshĂ«rosha|salalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosalalnkshĂ«rosha|gosalalnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisalalshĂ«rosha|gokisalalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salalshĂ«musha|salalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalalnkshĂ«musha|gosalalnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalalshĂ«musha|gokisalalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:salalronĂŒsha|salalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosalalnkronĂŒsha|gosalalnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisalalronĂŒsha|gokisalalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:salalroshĂ«sha|salalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosalalnkroshĂ«sha|gosalalnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisalalroshĂ«sha|gokisalalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salalromusha|salalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalalnkromusha|gosalalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalalromusha|gokisalalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:salalmunĂŒsha|salalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosalalnkmunĂŒsha|gosalalnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisalalmunĂŒsha|gokisalalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:salalmushĂ«sha|salalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosalalnkmushĂ«sha|gosalalnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisalalmushĂ«sha|gokisalalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:salalmurosha|salalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosalalnkmurosha|gosalalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisalalmurosha|gokisalalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:salal|salal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sĂŠlĂŠl|sĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosalal|hosalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosĂŠlĂŠl|hosĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosalal|hohosalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosĂŠlĂŠl|hohosĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒsalal|nĂŒsalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒsĂŠlĂŠl|nĂŒsĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsalal|nĂŒnĂŒsalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠlĂŠl|nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻsalal|nĂŻsalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻsĂŠlĂŠl|nĂŻsĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsalal|nĂŻnĂŻsalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠlĂŠl|nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusalal|lusalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lusĂŠlĂŠl|lusĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusalal|lulusalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusĂŠlĂŠl|lulusĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisalal|lisalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lisĂŠlĂŠl|lisĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisalal|lilisalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisĂŠlĂŠl|lilisĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosalal|kosalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosĂŠlĂŠl|kosĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosalal|kokosalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosĂŠlĂŠl|kokosĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesalal|kesalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesĂŠlĂŠl|kesĂŠlĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesalal|kekesalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesĂŠlĂŠl|kekesĂŠlĂŠl]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
